'''Garve''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] with [[Color/Legends|red]] hair and flamboyant earrings.

==Biography==
He was hired by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to be stationed at [[Mika (planetoid)|Jellyfish Cove]]. After the [[Mikan|jellyfish statues]] tried to [[Death/Legends|kill]] him, he killed his Imperial replacements and took the colony's [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] to [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], where he handed them off to [[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] [[Phlik]] as the newest recruits to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].
